title: September 11th, 2021 (2)
body:
- happy birthday mom
- dad getting in today at noon. cecilia not coming
- watched shang chi with brandi. pretty great. cried when dad died
- lyrics
    - stuck between two ferns
    - fertile but futile
    - the feeling is brutal
    - i wanna murder everything moving
    - and bet if i could get up i would do it
    - but then i wouldn't wanna so screw it
    - i'm in bed missing my cues acting clueless
    - totally buggin but my body's not budging
    - i know it sounds mental but sometimes i like this more than clubbing
    - cuz in case i'm sharin too much i got enough rooms to keep it unpublic
-
- it's frustrating trauma around preparation. feeling like the preparation i do is consistently disregarded, devalued, or degraded. feeling anxiety when i haven't prepared in appropriate, approved ways
- everything's experimental, experiments just vary in many ways
- some are more common and more predictable
-
